user.title: Connect Guesty
user.description: Enter your Guesty Open API credentials. You can find the Client ID and Client Secret in your Guesty account under Integrations > API & Webhooks.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect Guesty
reauth_confirm.description: The Guesty credentials are no longer valid. Enter a new Client ID and Client Secret.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API credentials (wrong Client ID or Secret)
error.no_permissions: Token received but no listing access – check Open API permissions in Guesty
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Guesty API

init.title: Guesty settings
init.description: Adjust synchronization and optionally enable secure, reservation-scoped door access.

data.expose_guest_details: Show guest names and confirmation codes in entities

access.title: Guest door access
access.description: Create a Guesty reservation custom field of type Text first. The integration writes one protected access link per active reservation. Optional branding images must use direct HTTPS URLs.

data.access_custom_field: Guesty custom field name or ID

listing.title: Locks for {listing}
listing.description: Select one to six Home Assistant lock entities and configure their guest-facing labels. Locks two through six are optional and only selected locks appear on the guest page. Known generic door names receive local translation suggestions; every language can be customized. These server-side assignments cannot be changed by a guest link.

loxone.title: Loxone reservation PINs
loxone.description: Generate one six-digit code per reservation and store it in a configurable Guesty reservation custom field. The custom field is the source of truth, so valid manual changes are synchronized to Loxone; duplicate codes are replaced automatically. Loxone users are created only shortly before access begins and are automatically deleted after access ends. The same early/late offsets as the door links are used.

data.loxone_provision_lead_minutes: Create Loxone user before access starts (minutes)
data.loxone_custom_field: Guesty code custom field name, {{variable}}, or ID

loxone_server.title: Loxone Miniserver {number}
loxone_server.description: Enter an HTTPS Miniserver or reverse-proxy URL. Saving tests the connection and loads the available user groups. Use a dedicated account with User management rights.

data.name: Display name
data.password: Password (leave empty to keep the current password)

loxone_listing.title: Loxone access for {listing}
loxone_listing.description: Select one or more user groups from exactly one Miniserver. Their permissions determine which doors the reservation PIN can open.

error.invalid_branding_url: Logo and favicon must use valid direct HTTPS URLs
error.same_lock: The same lock cannot be assigned twice
error.invalid_code_prefix: The PIN prefix must contain 1 or 2 digits
error.custom_field_not_found: Enter a Guesty reservation custom field name, variable, or ID
error.loxone_invalid_auth: Loxone rejected the account or it lacks User management rights
error.loxone_cannot_connect: Could not connect securely to this Loxone Miniserver
error.duplicate_loxone_server: This Miniserver connection is configured more than once
error.select_loxone_group: Select at least one Loxone user group
error.groups_from_one_server: All groups for one listing must belong to the same Miniserver

abort.no_listings: No Guesty listings are currently available
